creator: kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
Because I'm afraid of confuse these XEmacs packages with editor program,
I've changed `Port Directory Name' as follows:

% mv editors/xemacs-base editors/xemacs-base-packages
% mv editors/xemacs-sumo editors/xemacs-sumo-packages
% mv editors/mule-base editors/mule-base-packages
% mv editors/xemacs-mule-sumo editors/xemacs-mule-sumo-packages  

And then please patch followings:

diff -u -r -x CVS -x work -x *~ -x *.orig -N -I ^# *\$Id.*$ -I ^# *\$FreeBSD.*$ /usr/ports/tmp.cur/editors/xemacs-sumo-packages/Makefile editors/xemacs-sumo-packages/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/tmp.cur/editors/xemacs-sumo-packages/Makefile	Thu Aug 26 10:59:56 1999
+++ editors/xemacs-sumo-packages/Makefile	Wed Sep  8 15:09:56 1999
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 #
 
 DISTNAME=	xemacs-sumo-1999-07-13
+PKGNAME=	xemacs-sumo-1999-07-13-pkg
 CATEGORIES=	editors elisp
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.lab.kdd.co.jp/xemacs/packages/ \
 		ftp://ftp.xemacs.org/pub/xemacs/packages/ \
diff -u -r -x CVS -x work -x *~ -x *.orig -N -I ^# *\$Id.*$ -I ^# *\$FreeBSD.*$ /usr/ports/tmp.cur/editors/xemacs-mule-sumo-packages/Makefile editors/xemacs-mule-sumo-packages/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/tmp.cur/editors/xemacs-mule-sumo-packages/Makefile	Thu Aug 26 10:59:56 1999
+++ editors/xemacs-mule-sumo-packages/Makefile	Wed Sep  8 15:09:14 1999
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 #
 
 DISTNAME=	xemacs-mule-sumo-1999-07-13
+PKGNAME=	xemacs-mule-sumo-1999-07-13-pkg
 CATEGORIES=	editors elisp
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.lab.kdd.co.jp/xemacs/packages/ \
 		ftp://ftp.xemacs.org/pub/xemacs/packages/ \
